channel.title: Feed With Missing GUIDs
channel.description: Exercises the guid -> link -> hash(title+date) fallback chain.

item.title: Has a link but no guid
item.description: Dedup key comes from the link.

item.title: No guid and no link, only a date
item.description: Dedup key is synthesized from title + published date.

item.title: No guid, no link, no date
item.description: Dedup key is synthesized from the title alone.
